subcodes.first_line: O ye who are firm in the Covenant! Abdu'l-Baha is constantly engaged in ideal communication with any Spiritual Assembly
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر عهد هر محفل روحانی که بعنایت الهیه تشکیل گردد و اعضا در نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @prayer for morning
